channel.title: Ripple is looking for a WordPress Developer with experience in Frontity
channel.description:
Ripple is looking for a contractor WordPress Developer with **previous experience in Frontity** and other headless WordPress frameworks. Looks like a very interesting opportunity. :slight_smile:
https://boards.greenhouse.io/ripple/jobs/2639872

item.title: Ripple is looking for a WordPress Developer with experience in Frontity
item.dc:creator: mansi
item.description:
Hi @Reyes,

Thanks for your revert. Let me know if you or any person in your network require any assistance with any of the tech stacks. Looking forward to having a good business relationship.

Read full topic
item.source: Ripple is looking for a WordPress Developer with experience in Frontity

item.title: Ripple is looking for a WordPress Developer with experience in Frontity
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi @mansi and @santoshdevnath15,

Thanks for your answers. I just shared this opportunity with the community, but I don’t have any connection with the Ripple team. In any case, it looks like the job is no longer available.

Read full topic
item.source: Ripple is looking for a WordPress Developer with experience in Frontity

item.title: Ripple is looking for a WordPress Developer with experience in Frontity
item.dc:creator: santoshdevnath15
item.description:
Hi @Reyes we are a team of expert developers including PHP Developer, ReactJS, nextJS, Frontity Developer, WordPress Developer, Custom WordPress Plugin Developer, Server Manager, API Developer and much more.

Whatsapp, Telegram, and Call at +91 8077775266

Email santoshdevnath15@gmail.com

Read full topic
item.source: Ripple is looking for a WordPress Developer with experience in Frontity

item.title: Ripple is looking for a WordPress Developer with experience in Frontity
item.dc:creator: mansi
item.description:
Hello, @Reyes

It’s an interesting opportunity. Really looking forward to having a chat on this.
